publication_boundary: Indexes are derived counts and links. Raw Google Takeout, Audible exports, browser sessions, cookies, and extracted service files remain source bodies until their shape belongs directly in repo.

query_shapes.author_influence_wave: Search author_index.jsonl by id or exact name, then read wave.
query_shapes.concept_to_work_discovery: Load concept_work_map.json -> concepts[lc-*] for related significant works.
query_shapes.significant_work_discovery: Search significant_work_index.jsonl by id, title, or alias, then use concept links and chapter probes.
query_shapes.work_influence_wave: Search work_index.jsonl by id or exact title, then read wave.
